latHint: Think exhausted and worn out - not pool plumbing.
pivHint: Water leaves through the pool's DRAIN - but a long day can DRAIN you, leaving you how?
winText: Worn right out. DRAIN was the pivot - pool plumbing to feeling utterly WEARY.
lossText: WEARY - exhausted, worn out. DRAIN was the pivot: pool DRAIN to feeling DRAIN-ed and WEARY.
